key_insights.insight: 80% of success is determined by one's beliefs, highlighting the power of mindset in achieving goals.
key_insights.quote: 80% of your success is down to your beliefs.

key_insights.insight: The mind's primary function is to validate and materialize one's thoughts, regardless of their truth.
key_insights.quote: Your mind's job is to make your thoughts real even if it's not true.

key_insights.insight: You can choose to lie to yourself, cheat fear, and steal back the confidence you were born with, by practicing positive affirmations.
key_insights.quote: I think you should lie to yourself I think you should lie to yourself I think you should liecheat and steal every day of your life lie to your mind cheat fear and steal back the confidence youwere born with

key_insights.insight: Thoughts you repeatedly think become your reality.
key_insights.quote: When you think a thought a lot over and over again, it becomes real even if it's not real.

key_insights.insight: The link between intimacy and eroticism in long-term relationships is fantasy.
key_insights.quote: There's a bridge that links eroticism to intimacy, and it's called fantasy.

key_insights.insight: Many sexual dysfunctions arise from thoughts and pressures, not necessarily physical problems.
key_insights.quote: It's one of the areas in life where it's so clear to me that thoughts are the problem and thesolution.

key_insights.insight: The feeling that cannot find its expression in tears will make other organs weep, meaning that unexpressed emotions often manifest physically.
key_insights.quote: The feeling that cannot find its expression in tears will make other organs weep.

key_insights.insight: There are three things wrong with every person: I'm different so I can't connect, I want something it's not available to me, and I'm not enough.
key_insights.quote: One of them is, I'm different, so I can't connect.The next one is, I want something, it's not available to me.And the third one is, I'm not enough.

actionable_advice.advice: Challenge and update your beliefs regularly.
actionable_advice.how_to: Ask yourself: Where did this belief come from? Is it true? Does it have to be true for me?

actionable_advice.advice: Lie to your mind with positive affirmations to boost confidence.
actionable_advice.how_to: Repeat empowering statements about your abilities and worth to reprogram your subconscious.

actionable_advice.advice: To improve your sex life, incorporate newness, drama, mystery, suspense, and edginess.
actionable_advice.how_to: Explore fantasies, try new locations or scenarios, or introduce an element of surprise.

actionable_advice.advice: Identify and categorize your needs in a relationship.
actionable_advice.how_to: Categorize them into must-haves (needs partner must meet), can-do-myself (needs you can fulfill independently), and give-ups (needs not worth fighting over).

actionable_advice.advice: To manifest love, cultivate self-worth and target the specific activities or environments of your ideal partner.
actionable_advice.how_to: Affirm your worthiness of love daily, visualize your ideal partner's qualities and hobbies, and attend places where they are likely to be.

memorable_stories: The story of Marissa's client who got pregnant after pretending to be an air stewardess in order to increase her partner's sperm count.
An anecdote about rams in New Zealand exhibiting extreme sexual behavior and weight loss to mate with every female ewe.
The anecdote about a man who was fired and didn't tell his wife and got sick until she told him to resign and he didn't have to tell her he lost his job.
contrarian_claims: Eroticism in long-term relationships requires mystery and is separate from the intimacy in a relationship.
People have affairs not because they don't love their partner, but because they're missing out.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - The No.1 Celebrity Therapist: The WEIRD Trick To Get Your Sex Life Back, Fix Erections & Increase Fertility! - Marisa Peer
